methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: The tracked cash in the LendingPool must never exceed its actual underlying token balance.
invariants.attack_scenario: If cash exceeds the actual balance, the pool is insolvent. Attackers could have drained funds without updating the cash variable, leaving subsequent users unable to withdraw.

invariants.description: Total debt and total debt shares must be strictly correlated: one cannot be zero while the other is non-zero.
invariants.attack_scenario: If totalDebt > 0 but totalDebtShares == 0, the pool has unbacked debt, breaking the interest rate model and debt repayment logic. If totalDebtShares > 0 but totalDebt == 0, borrowers have shares but owe nothing, breaking accounting.

invariants.description: Flashloan operations must strictly conserve or increase the pool's underlying token balance.
invariants.attack_scenario: An attacker could use a reentrancy or malicious callback to bypass the repayment check, draining the pool's assets without repaying the flashloan.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_flashloan_conservation() public { // checked within flash() }

invariants.description: The uncheckedPosIds set must always be empty when not actively executing a multicall, ensuring no position bypasses health validation.
invariants.attack_scenario: If an attacker can manipulate the multicall state to leave uncheckedPosIds populated after the transaction ends, they can create undercollateralized positions, leading to bad debt.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_health_checks_completed() public view { assert(isMulticallTx || uncheckedPosIds.length() == 0); }

invariants.description: The total collateral balances tracked internally must not exceed the actual ERC20 balance of the PosManager contract.
invariants.attack_scenario: If internal collateral balances exceed the actual token balance, the PosManager is insolvent. Users would not be able to withdraw their collateral, leading to a loss of funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_collateral_solvency(address pool) public view { assert(__collBalances[pool] <= IERC20(pool).balanceOf(address(this))); }

invariants.description: The total wrapped LP tokens minted for a specific pool ID (pid) must not exceed the actual LP tokens deposited in the MasterChef contract.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract mints more wrapped LP tokens than it has backed in the MasterChef, it becomes insolvent. Users would be unable to unwrap their tokens, leading to a loss of funds.
invariants.invariant_logic: sum(__lpBalances[id] for id in pids[pid]) <= IMasterChef(MASTER_CHEF).getDeposit(pid, address(this))
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_wlp_solvency(uint pid) public view { assert(total_lp_balances(pid) <= IMasterChef(MASTER_CHEF).getDeposit(pid, address(this))); }

invariants.description: The value of collateral seized during liquidation must exactly equal the value of the debt repaid multiplied by the liquidation incentive multiplier.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the calculation is flawed, liquidators could extract excess collateral (draining the user) or receive too little (stalling liquidations and causing bad debt).
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_liquidation_fairness() public { // verified via oracle prices during liquidate() }

invariants.description: The exchange rate of lending pool shares to underlying assets should be monotonically increasing or constant over time.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the share price decreases, lenders lose principal or accrued yield. This could be caused by an inflation attack or improper debt accounting.
invariants.invariant_logic: toAmt(1e18) @ t2 >= toAmt(1e18) @ t1 (where t2 >= t1)
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_share_price_monotonicity() public view { assert(currentSharePrice >= lastSharePrice); }
